description: Partial correlation r(feature, w0 | Om, s8) per b2_mean_persistence DM vs r(Ridge/MLP(P(k)), w0) marginale. Stessa base test set N=400.

ridge_pk_marginal.note: r(yhat_ridge, w0) marginal — non partial-corr formale

paper_interpretation: b2_mean_persistence DM carries significant w0 information beyond Om/s8 (r_partial=0.070, sigma=1.39sigma on N=400 test). The marginal correlation r=+0.005 was suppressed by degeneracy with Om/s8. Ridge(P(k)) marginal r=+0.113 (2.26sigma) partially captures w0 but cannot separate it from Om/s8 without explicit conditioning. b2_mean_persistence provides complementary topological information that is orthogonal to P(k) in the Om/s8-residual space.

b2_hod_partial.interpretation: Tracer bias activates topological w0 sensitivity: DM 1.1sigma vs HOD 3.73sigma at same z=0

tracer_activation_result.conclusion: HOD tracer bias amplifies topological w0 signal by 3.3x vs DM field
